content.problemStatement:
Maximum Sum of subarray of size K    (2.5 Marks)Given an integer array arr of size N and an integer K, find the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray of size K.

A subarray is a contiguous part of the array.


Input Format
The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases.


For each test case:


The first line contains two integers N and K.


The second line contains N space-separated integers representing the array elements.



Output Format
For each test case, print the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray of size K

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n = int(input())
    nums = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    max_sum = nums[0]
    current_sum = nums[0]
    
    for i in range(1, n):
        current_sum = max(nums[i], current_sum + nums[i])
        max_sum = max(max_sum, current_sum)
    
    print(max_sum)
